name: Mia's 30th
title: Party invite
summary: A themed birthday-party invite with a live countdown, an embedded map and directions, a dress-code callout, and a validating RSVP form with guest count, a conditional +1, dietary needs, and a "can't make it" path.
setup_questions: What's the occasion, who's hosting, and what mood should the invitation set?
What's the date, time, venue, full address, and weather backup plan?
What should guests know about dress, food, gifts, parking, or accessibility?
Where should RSVPs go, and which guest details do you need to collect?
sections: Hero: occasion + name + date/time with a live countdown and confetti
Details: dress code front and centre, a card grid (food, drinks, gifts, weather), and a host's note
Map + written directions (transit, parking/rideshare, finding the door)
RSVP form (accept/decline, guests, conditional +1, dietary, song request)
Can't-make-it path with a birthday note to the host
based_on: A realistic, evergreen example modeled on a common real-world need: a themed birthday-party invite with countdown, map, dress code, and a validating RSVP.
